problem: Tool re-execution on task retry has no idempotency guard — duplicate payments, emails, trades possible. When a CrewAI task fails and is retried — via max_retry_limit, exception handling, or external re-trigger — any @tool decorated function that already executed runs again. There's no mechanism to detect that a specific tool call already completed. (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
